name: InterGen Data
description: InterGen Data predicts 95 critical life events before they occur--divorces, illnesses, career shifts, wealth transfers. We integrate with financial services, insurance, and healthcare systems, enabling proactive action: advisors reach out before the divorce, underwriters adjust coverage before the diagnosis, compliance spots risks before they materialize. We don't analyze what happened--we tell you what's coming next.
